rationale.regulatory-compliance: Assurance cases explicitly demonstrate adversarial-robustness compliance with the EU AI Act.
rationale.org-governance: Meta-layer structures continuous risk management, accountability, incident reporting, and assurance.
rationale.rules-based-checks: Layered guardrails include tests, vulnerability libraries, filters, and sandbox verification.
rationale.oversight-explanation: Graphical assurance arguments provide human-readable evidence for developers, engineers, and auditors.
rationale.framework: Proposes a layered assurance-case architecture for deployed LLM application pipelines.
rationale.intro-framing: Frames dynamic vulnerabilities and regulation as requiring continuous, structured assurance.
